svg.title: Crash event flow
svg.desc: Step by step flow from crash detection on the phone through to hospital and police dispatch

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What sensor data gets sent in the crash event payload?')
sendPrompt('How should the 30-second cancellation window work?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the backend when the user cancels a false alarm?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a crash is confirmed after the window?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /crash endpoint receive?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI scoring service work for crash severity?')
sendPrompt('How does the geo lookup find the nearest hospital?')
sendPrompt('What payload gets sent to the hospital and police dashboards?')
g.text: Location, time, score, blood group, medical history
